action.reasoning: Observation: I've been training the model with cleanlab integration to identify and exclude noisy labels. The training has completed 25 epochs with a validation accuracy of about 38.86%. The training accuracy is much higher (~96%), which is expected but indicates some overfitting. The model is using ResNet50 with focal loss (gamma=2) and label smoothing. I found that cleanlab identified some potentially noisy labels in the training set. Analysis: The approach of using cleanlab to identify and exclude noisy labels is promising, but I need to evaluate how well this model performs on the test set. The current validation accuracy of ~38.86% corresponds to the 44.79% test accuracy from the previous evaluation, which was the best result so far. Decision: I'll submit the current model for evaluation to see if the cleanlab-based label cleaning improves the test performance compared to the previous best result of 44.79%.
